calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Continued To Nov-28-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-28-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Daniel Stern, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Lucerne Apartments, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness: Jay Lieberman, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Gary Lanford.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Complaint-------------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 766 Sutter St., #13, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,353.24
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN FOR PLAINTIFF LUCERNE APARTMENTS, LP
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GARY LANFORD

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
